name: Kubernetes Liveness Probes
title: Kubernetes Liveness and Readiness Probes
description: Create standard Kubernetes deployment YAML configurations including livenessProbe (HTTP GET /healthz), readinessProbe (HTTP GET /ready), resource requests and limits, and a securityContext running as non-root.

name: Kubernetes Horizontal Scaling
title: Kubernetes HorizontalPodAutoscaler
description: Create a HorizontalPodAutoscaler manifest for a FastAPI deployment. Scale between 2 and 10 replicas based on CPU utilization (target 70%) and custom Prometheus metrics (requests per second).

name: Cloud Run Deployment
title: Google Cloud Run Service Configuration
description: Create a Cloud Run service configuration in YAML. Set memory to 512Mi, CPU to 1, min-instances to 1, max-instances to 10, concurrency to 80, and configure secrets from Secret Manager as environment variables.

name: GitHub Actions CI/CD
title: GitHub Actions Deploy to Cloud Run
description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that: builds a Docker image, pushes to Google Artifact Registry, and deploys to Cloud Run on push to main. Use Workload Identity Federation (not service account keys).

name: Alembic Migration Setup
title: Database Migration with Alembic
description: Create an Alembic migration setup for a FastAPI project. Configure env.py to use async SQLAlchemy, write a migration that creates a users table with UUID primary key, email unique index, and created_at timestamp.

name: Nginx Reverse Proxy
title: Nginx Reverse Proxy for FastAPI
description: Configure Nginx as a reverse proxy for a FastAPI application. Enable gzip compression, configure rate limiting per IP, set proper proxy headers (X-Forwarded-For, X-Real-IP), and configure SSL termination.

name: Terraform GCP Cloud Run
title: Terraform Module for Cloud Run Service
description: Write Terraform configuration to deploy a containerized FastAPI application to Google Cloud Run. Include VPC connector, secret references, IAM service account bindings, and Cloud SQL connection.

name: Zero-Downtime Deploy
title: Zero-Downtime Blue-Green Deployment
description: Implement a blue-green deployment strategy for a FastAPI service on Cloud Run. Use traffic splitting (100%/0% → 50%/50% → 0%/100%) with automated smoke tests between each stage.

name: Kubernetes ConfigMap Secrets
title: Kubernetes ConfigMap and Secret Management
description: Create Kubernetes ConfigMap for non-sensitive app configuration and Secret for sensitive values. Mount them as environment variables in a deployment. Demonstrate how to rotate secrets without restarting pods.

name: Pre-Deploy Smoke Test
title: Automated Deployment Smoke Tests
description: Create a post-deployment smoke test script in Python. Hit key API endpoints, verify responses, check database connectivity, and page the on-call engineer via webhook if any checks fail within 2 minutes.

name: Vault Config Loader
title: Secure Vault Configuration Loader
description: Write a Python startup utility that authenticates against HashiCorp Vault via AppRole and loads secret keys into application environment variables on startup. Cache secrets with a 5-minute refresh interval.

name: Rollback Automation
title: Automated Deployment Rollback
description: Create a shell/Python script that monitors deployment health metrics (error rate, latency p99) after a deploy. If thresholds are breached within 5 minutes, automatically roll back to the previous revision.
